scripts.build: set "PATH=%CD%\scripts;%PATH%" && corepack pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@saayro/* --dangerously-disable-package-manager-check
scripts.typecheck: set "PATH=%CD%\scripts;%PATH%" && corepack pnpm exec turbo run typecheck --filter=@saayro/* --dangerously-disable-package-manager-check
scripts.lint: set "PATH=%CD%\scripts;%PATH%" && corepack pnpm exec turbo run lint --filter=@saayro/* --dangerously-disable-package-manager-check
scripts.dev: set "PATH=%CD%\scripts;%PATH%" && corepack pnpm exec turbo run dev --filter=@saayro/* --dangerously-disable-package-manager-check
scripts.clean: set "PATH=%CD%\scripts;%PATH%" && corepack pnpm exec turbo run clean --filter=@saayro/* --dangerously-disable-package-manager-check
